headline: Howmet Aerospace to Host Webcast and Announce Second Quarter 2026 Results
summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE: HWM) will announce its second quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, August 6, 2026. The press release and presentation materials will be available at approximately 7:00 AM ET on August 6, 2026, via the "Investors" section of the Howmet Aerospace website.
